Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-02-18
Message-ID: <mvfa3xJLRPKldtmYmrSDOg@geopod-ismtpd-25>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="8af173e7ad492df9374ea661bc9334673549ab49704c7e83b770678565a7"

Hi there, Llama Afficionados! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter!
We're thrilled to share some exciting updates, including
innovative tutorials, new integrations, and community highlights.
Dive in to discover how you can leverage these advancements in
your projects!

🤩 The Highlights:

* Integrate LlamaIndex with Google Cloud: Easily connect your
LlamaIndex with Google Cloud databases for enhanced data
management and retrieval. Documentation ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GhR4oszojTSbHkgWY_ac0Q5vNXyTPctLpWBb7zT7hjs ) , Tweet ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.URG6vTVAGV8t-UX9fZUQYQ0I8F6beTpacqPuZsFNBSw ).

* LlamaParse Video Tutorial: Learn everything about LlamaParse,
including multiple parsing modes and using parsing instructions
to improve quality. Video ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..j000S2uMOsxvgEAqsd2p-kuXxnd77gLkdQuyqZreFEg ), Tweet 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.xsRYOAxEISMk5O0rZ3oG5X-4uXxdo1ElRjCA3wOefyU ).

✨ Framework:

* Transforming Data with GraphRAG Pipelines: Discover how to
create knowledge graphs from unstructured data and enhance LLM
accuracy with domain-specific knowledge using @cognee_ and
@llama_index. Tutorial ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..FMN900HGfP4mp-Ij3FmRAMJkDOtGiz6TyK-uiJg2m1g ), Tweet 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.j2M__YkBtHE7_3TxoPrJDUVQIkCylsQ_S8q6C4gC6aE ).

* Automated Sales Outreach Agent: Build an agent that writes
outreach emails and schedules meetings using @llama_index
workflows and tools from @composiohq. Notebook 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..llhCFL9qncEp_GL4o07Gn45RoU7gTaUW9OVGRniDjNM ), Tweet 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.uae3btYLzrhin1nDeg98G2mF4juV5JLb3G-CaejSuAw ).

* CrossPoster Open Source Release: Today, we open-sourced
CrossPoster, an app that cross-posts to Twitter, LinkedIn, and
BlueSky using AI. Try it out ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..scqNyah2co_4JoiThXx3QGRItYe2-CD8XGXycg47T9Q ), Tweet 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.i5Lqk4t7L8IjBRd8C2Bt-mrKZ4tXR0XjkA5tYcJGC50 ).

✍️ Community:

* AI Sales Agent Tutorial: Learn how to build an AI sales agent
that studies your company and writes perfect outreach
emails. Tweet ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.73cnoDp89g817qBxOwXcAdCwkczwVnXIHin9lSeJaUI ) .

* DeepSeek AI Live Stream Recap: Catch the highlights from the
live stream event discussing @deepseek_ai and its deployment on
various platforms. Stream ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3mNNizKEqvy5gCKZRb6EP_59NOUZOjI6FJ5XVkjHF6c ), Tweet 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.rCS0AilHwdIiuXRhWTDiIkOlg1ARxqJ6vNl9ST7zA-A ).

* Case Study on Life Sciences Marketing: See how LlamaIndex
transformed life sciences marketing with AI-driven automation,
achieving significant improvements in campaign creation and
compliance. Case Study ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..HNik7I20YpqpXeaVBOzmYyDNHPl3JBTv1iSsCLpQiuE ), Tweet 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.qq8bh8E_pL1YFmW6daz4PXrsnUoHaGaXRY8RDfCfR7k ).

Thank you for being part of our community! We look forward to
seeing how you utilize these tools and insights in your projects.
Stay tuned for more updates next week!

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..igbvZ-dzJ3qGN5I-HE81dBW5cEl-hrMCt0HWvoVRZZ0 )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..XpKIjdcHXUnikQj5q4XxeGtpEEuqVuGaL3irw67D5gs )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..A4UyofTR-8nJkvJslAxkizJec8PNb1P4834M5lQZQ7M )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
